blurb: Centre for Long-Term Resilience — UK think tank on extreme risk (AI, bio, risk management), advising government with named-author reports and consultation submissions.

publications.title: Ten things we want to see from Exercise Pegasus
publications.summary: CLTR's ten benchmarks for best-in-class national risk-preparedness exercising, set ahead of the UK's Exercise Pegasus.

publications.title: Gap consolidation of the mirror life evidence base
publications.byline: Paul-Enguerrand Fady, Sarah Winthrope, James Walker, Cassidy Nelson
publications.summary: Identifies specific, safe knowledge gaps to fill for mirror-life preparedness without lowering barriers to creating it — biosecurity-meets-AI risk methodology.

publications.title: Global Risk Index for AI-enabled Biological Tools
publications.byline: Toby Webster, Richard Moulange, Barbara Del Castello, James Walker, Sana Zakaria, Cassidy Nelson
publications.summary: CLTR-RAND introduce the first Global Risk Index for AI-enabled biological tools — a framework to assess the AI-bio risk frontier.

publications.title: Strategic Defence Review 2024: Call for Evidence (CLTR submission)
publications.summary: CLTR's detailed recommendations to the MoD Strategic Defence Review on CBRN threats — a named consultation submission (high-signal, defended-in-public evidence).

notes: [publications backfill 2026-06-26] Harvested from the org's own publications page. Some items lack a visible date on the index — null rather than fabricated; refine on a later pass.
